summary: Completed comprehensive testing of OttimizzazionePage (Risultati) redesign with 6 sections. All backend tests passed (6/6). All frontend features verified working correctly including the NEW 'Prossimo Livello Consigliato' section (Section 5) with Foundation/Growth/Scale levels linked to Growth System.
critical_code_review_comments: OttimizzazionePage correctly implements all 6 sections in correct order: Stato → KPI → Diagnosi → Prossima Azione → Prossimo Livello → Trend
Section 1 (Blocco Stato): Title 'Come sta andando la tua accademia' present, shows 'Non stabile' (red) when all KPI are 0
Section 2 (KPI Dashboard): 4 cards (Visite, Contatti, Vendite, Conversione) with 'stabile' trend badges when trend=0
Section 3 (Diagnosi Automatica): Shows 'Nessun dato ancora' when KPI are 0
Section 4 (Prossima Azione): Shows 'Pubblica il primo contenuto' with 'Fallo adesso' CTA when KPI are 0
Section 5 (Prossimo Livello Consigliato - NEW): Shows Foundation recommendation with 'CONSIGLIATO PER TE' badge, motivation text, and 'Scopri Foundation' CTA button
Section 5 CTA button correctly navigates to growth-system page via onNavigate prop
Section 6 (Trend Block): Shows 'Stabile' with 'Andamento generale' label when all trends are 0
Protocollo Vendites checklist correctly REMOVED from this page (not present)
Backend GET /api/partner-journey/ottimizzazione/{partner_id} returns correct KPI structure with all 4 metrics and trends

All data-testid attributes present and working: blocco-stato, kpi-dashboard, kpi-card-*, diagnosi-automatica, diagnosi-start, prossima-azione, prossimo-livello, prossimo-livello-cta, trend-block, risultati-hero
test_credentials: Admin: claudio.bertogliatti@gmail.com / Evoluzione74, Partner ID: 2 (Arianna Aceto)
context_for_next_testing_agent: OttimizzazionePage (Risultati) fully tested with NEW Section 5 'Prossimo Livello Consigliato'. Navigation: Login as admin → Click 'Vista Partner' tab → Click 'Risultati' in sidebar. Page features 6 sections: 1) Blocco Stato 'Come sta andando la tua accademia', 2) KPI grid with 4 cards + trend badges, 3) Diagnosi Automatica, 4) Prossima Azione dark block with CTA, 5) NEW Prossimo Livello Consigliato (Foundation/Growth/Scale linked to Growth System), 6) Trend block. Protocollo Vendites checklist has been REMOVED from this page. Backend endpoint: GET /api/partner-journey/ottimizzazione/{partner_id}. Current data has all KPI at 0, so page shows initial state messages.

features_tested.OttimizzazionePage renders 6 sections in: PASS - Stato → KPI → Diagnosi → Prossima Azione → Prossimo Livello → Trend
features_tested.Prossimo Livello shows motivation text: PASS - 'Il tuo funnel non sta ancora generando risultati costanti...'
